reason: Titanic’s sweeping romance, grandiose staging, and tragic climax sweep you headlong into aching destiny.
Before Sunrise’s whispered confessions under Viennese moonlight capture pure, ephemeral enchantment.
Gone with the Wind’s sweeping Civil War saga and indomitable passion engulf you in epic, romantic fervor.
Romeo and Juliet’s timeless verses and star-crossed moments unleash a heart-stopping wave of longing.
